title: More Weapons and Tools
description: adds unique gadgets that range from helpful to crazy. vanilla-related armour, weapons, and tools like an emerald pickaxe
body:
More weapons and tools like the name says adds more weapons and tools to the game but also gadgets and armour. currently there are 5 tools that have been added:

- emerald pickaxe
- lapis pickaxe
- lapis axe
- copper pickaxe
- command shovel(WIP)

# Gadgets:
## Stabilizer 
![Stabilizer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e485d72f0030470fd573c437865e61532a0542bd.png)

changes attributes back to normal(only works for a few currently)

## Climbing Gadget
![climbing gadget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e83dd73238c58c447427b3c9b5c27e3d51d911e.png)

allows you to climb better

## Building Gadget
![building gadget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1072b85335fd5076266977f5847cee865e606635.png)

further block reach
